utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these sections. Each section is fully detailed: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health with explicit costs; property_coverage specifies what is covered and cost info; travel_coverage includes coverage details and cost note; additional_services lists the services and cost info; total_budget provides a full monthly/annual cost breakdown with multiple financial details. Therefore, all required items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes several coverage types all under the 'EliteCare Premium Plan.' For mapping to the ground-truth ratings, we identify the relevant entries: (1) Physical health coverage corresponds to 'EliteCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage → physical_health, which has a rating of 10. (2) Mental health coverage also cites the 'EliteCare Premium Plan' (mental_health section), which has a rating of 10. (3) Property coverage is bundled in the same 'EliteCare Premium Plan' — this plan covers high-value property and aligns with property_protection → home_content → 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' rated 10. (4) Travel coverage, also under 'EliteCare Premium Plan', matches mobility_coverage → travel_insurance → 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' rated 10. (5) Additional services such as 24/7 concierge, global assistance, etc., are consistent with the travel_enhancement_services → 'Concierge Services' rated 8. Therefore, the mapping reflects these ratings.
